name: 30qt Heavy Duty Latching Clear Storage Box - Brightroom™: Stackable Plastic Bin with Lid, Universal Utility Storage
description:
The Brightroom™ Garage Storage Bin with lid makes it easy to organize busy spaces, from garages and basements to utility rooms. Built for demanding environments, the clear plastic bin lets you quickly see and grab what you need while keeping items protected. Rugged, secure latches hold the lid firmly in place during carrying and stacking, and the textured surface provides a comfortable, non-slip grip. Deep recessed lids provide stability when stacking, maximizing vertical storage space. This 30 quart storage container is ideal for boots, small power tools, extension cords, and camping gear, as well as gardening or workshop supplies, delivering dependable, versatile storage for every space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
